___ew693_notes: This config enables INDEPENDENT per-plugin versioning so a plugin
release does not require a platform release (FR-7). Today every
@ever-works/*-plugin is at 1.0.0 lockstep; Changesets lets each one
bump on its own changelog entry.
access: restricted (per user directive 2026-06-03) — plugins publish
as PRIVATE packages on npm until the user explicitly authorises
flipping any of them to public. Override per-changeset only with
ignore: internal apps + cross-cutting packages NOT meant for
public/private npm publication. They version with the platform.
@ever-works/plugin is intentionally NOT in ignore — it ships to npm
as the SDK consumed by 3rd-party plugin authors.
